title: Wigearss 0.001g/50g Digital Milligram Scale, Mini Gram Scale,Pocket Micro Scale for Jewelry,Powders,Medicine,food, High Precision Mg Sc-ale with Tweezer,Cal Weight, Battery,Measuring Cup-50g MAX
features: 1.Accurate Weighing: maximum range 50 grams, readability 0.001 grams, press the "UNIT" button to easily switch between 7 weighing units (oz, ozt, dwt, ct, tl，g，gn). to meet your weighing requirements for different items.

2.LCD Display: The precision scales 0.001g is equipped with a backlit LCD display that allows you to easily read the weight in any environment. To save the battery, the automatic shut-off function is activated after 180 seconds of inactivity.

3. Tare Weight and Calibration: The tare weight function allows you to deduct the weight of the measuring cup by simply pressing the "TARE" button, accurately obtaining the net weight of the item. Calibration function, there is a high-precision weight of 50 grams in the box, which can easily recalibrate the balance.

4.Convenient And Practical: The weighing pan material is made of stainless steel, which is durable and easy to clean. The outer shell material is made of ABS, which has a lightweight feel and is wear-resistant and impact resistant.
5.Multipurpose: Suitable for different weighing requirements of small items such as jewelry, diamonds, gold, medicinal herbs, and other fine powders.

Built-in Overload Protection (Max 50g): Protect Your Scale Placing an item exceeding 50g on the platform or jostling the scale during transport will trigger an "OLD" display. To resume accurate weighing, remove the weight, power the scale off, and then turn it back on.

Note: 1.Calibrate First: Upon arrival, calibrate using the included weights (max 50g). Refer to the picture, product description, or video for calibration steps.2.Stable Placement: Use the scale on a firm, vibration-free, draft-free surface.3.Place the object as lightly as possible in the middle of the weighing pan.
